title: A Quiet Place: Day One Box Office Report
text: The sci-fi horror film starring Lupita Nyong'o and Joseph Quinn has achieved significant commercial success, crossing the $200 million mark at the worldwide box office. In North America, the film surpassed $100 million, earning $104.4 million domestically as of the reporting date. Industry projections suggested a final domestic run between $145-165 million. The movie accumulated approximately $95.6 million from overseas markets, demonstrating strong global appeal. Directed by Michael Sarnoski, the film served as a prequel to the A Quiet Place franchise. With an estimated production budget of $67 million, the box office returns represented a substantial return on investment. The film opened in US theaters on June 26, 2024, with an opening weekend of $52.2 million. Critics responded positively to the horror entry, and audiences showed sustained interest throughout its theatrical run.
